headline: Deloitte expands NVIDIA partnership for physical AI solutions
summary: Deloitte announced an expanded partnership with NVIDIA to develop physical AI solutions for industry applications. The collaboration focuses on bringing AI capabilities to physical operations and manufacturing processes through NVIDIA's technology platform.
so_what: Physical AI has significant healthcare applications including robotics, medical devices, and hospital operations automation. This partnership positions Deloitte to offer advanced AI solutions that could transform healthcare delivery and operations.
original_title: Deloitte expands partnership with Nvidia to develop physical AI solutions for industry - Robotics & Automation News
